title: Why Young Entrepreneurs Are Reshaping Business Technology
description: The technology landscape is shifting, and it’s not just because of artificial intelligence or cloud computing. It’s because a new generation of business leaders is asking fundamental questions about what technology should actually accomplish: solving problems and creating value, not just being “modern for modern’s sake.” Botnari Dumitru represents this new wave of entrepreneurial thinking. title: How Technology Is Powering the Next Generation of Banking
description: Global investment in next-generation banking technology reached $95 billion in 2025, according to IDC’s Financial Services Technology Spending Tracker. The spending covers cloud infrastructure, artificial intelligence, real-time payment systems, and API platforms that together form the technology stack powering the next generation of banking. title: Musk Unveils ‘Terafab’ Plan to Boost Chip Production for Tesla, SpaceX

title: DPIIT signs MoU with KRAFTON India to support startups in gaming, digital entertainment sectors
description: Under this collaboration, DPIIT will work with KRAFTON India Pvt Ltd to explore the organisation of innovation challenges under the Bharat Startup Grand Challenge, along with targeted hackathons, workshops, and masterclasses across domains such as game design, animation, immersive technologies, esports management, and artificial intelligence applications. The collaboration will also facilitate industry interactions, knowledge exchange, and exposure to global best practices. Selected startups may gain opportunities for pilot collaborations, with potential for further engagement based on outcomes.

title: What If Animals Were Always Talking, And We’ve Only Been Listening the Wrong Way?
description: New research reveals animal communication hinges on emotions, not just words. Early studies explored symbols, but Artificial Intelligence now deciphers subtle vocalizations and behaviors. This technology helps understand animal feelings and intentions. Sound and body language create a feedback loop, improving interaction. Ethical awareness is crucial as science deepens our connection with animals.

title: The Convergence of Fintech, AI and Blockchain in Modern Finance
description: Spending on artificial intelligence in financial services reached $35 billion in 2024, while blockchain-related investment in finance exceeded $12 billion, according to Statista and CB Insights. These technologies are no longer developing in isolation. AI, blockchain, and fintech are converging into integrated systems that process transactions, assess risk, and enforce compliance simultaneously. The intersection of […]
